name: Cold Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups oriental noodles (glass noodles or ramen)
1 1/2 cups roast chicken breast, cut into 1 cm pieces
1 1/2 cups mixed sliced vegetables (see below), raw
15 ml red chili and garlic paste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the noodles and add the peanut sauce (below) to them, mixing by hand to coat evenly.
2. Form the noodles into a bed in the serving dish and sprinkle over the top with chicken and vegetables to taste (fresh mushrooms, broccoli flowerets, and matchstick carrots and zucchini are good choices). Top with peanuts.
Peanut Sauce:
1. Mix all ingredients together to form a thin emulsion.
